Notification.command: powershell -WindowStyle Hidden -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; [System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show('Claude necesita tu atención: ' + $env:CLAUDE_NOTIFICATION_TYPE)"

Stop.command: powershell -WindowStyle Hidden -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; [System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show('Claude ha terminado su tarea.')"
